wonder.intro: Wonder together about time and interesting things.

questions.text: Have you ever started one thing and ended up doing something completely different?
When time seems to zoom past, what does that feel like in your body?
What might help you pause when something interesting appears?

pocket.reflection: Sometimes interesting things arrive like a zoomie — and that's okay. You can notice them, pause, and come back to what matters.
pocket.pipLine: Pip keeps the Pause Pebble safe in the pocket.
